title: WarnerMedia OneFifty Acquires Oscar-Shortlisted Films Namoo and When the Sun Sets for HBO Max
overview: WarnerMedia OneFifty has acquired two short films, NAMOO and WHEN THE SUN SETS, to be released on HBO Max on January 27 and February 8, respectively. The films are both shortlisted to be nominated for the 2022 Academy Awards, NAMOO in the Animated Short Film category

title: WarnerMedia OneFifty Acquires Oscar-Nominated Live Action Short Please Hold for HBO Max
overview: PLEASE HOLD is the first Live Action Short Film Oscar-nominee this season to land with a major streamer. Following a successful festival run, the film was acquired by WarnerMedia OneFifty to stream exclusively on HBO Max, where it will launch on March 17. It is directed

title: WarnerMedia OneFifty Acquires Academy Award Nominated Feature Film Drive My Car For HBO Max
overview: WarnerMedia OneFifty has acquired the Japanese road drama DRIVE MY CAR to premiere on HBO Max on March 2, 2022. The film is directed by Ryusuke Hamaguchi who also co-wrote the screenplay with Takamasa Oe, adapted from the short story of the same name by Haruki Murakami.

title: WARNERMEDIA SCALES UP CONTENT & PRODUCTION TEAMS ACROSS ASIA
